ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Future Account
Off Calendar Jun-14-2011 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Apr-15-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Franchesca Callejo for Marion Jackson (Trustee). Lawrence Siracusa for Edgar Wilson (Trustor).

Ms. Callejo stated that the primary reason for the Trust was so that Edgar Wilson could gain maturity and money managing skills, that Edgar has depleted a fair amount of the funds, that her Client no longer wanted the responsibility and that she anticipated that Mr. Wilson would file a waiver of any future accountings. In addition, Ms. Callejo went over the expenditures, Mr. Wilson's driving skills and employment history. Mr. Siracusa stated that he has had little contact with Mr. Wilson since the time he became an adult, that Mr. Wilson's wish was to terminate the Trust and that he was difficult to get a hold of. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Mar-22-2010 Continued To Apr-12-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Mar-08-2010 Continued To Mar-22-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE 2nd Account
Off Calendar Jan-12-2010 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE 2nd Account
Off Calendar Dec-01-2009 Reset To Jan-12-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Franchesca Callejo for Marion Jackson (Trustee).

Ms. Callejo stated that the Trustor had contacted Mr. Siracusa stating that he wanted to terminate the trust, that they were having difficulties with the checking account as they were missing about 60 checks, that the accounting was largely prepared and that it made sense to extend the accounting period so that she could file the Second and Final account. In addition, she stated that there was about $70,000.00 left and that her Client was willing to file the petition for termination of the trust. The matter was continued to January 12, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of the second account. The Court directed Counsel to stick to the original accounting schedule which is to cover from June 1, 2007 through May 31, 2009.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE 2nd Account
Off Calendar Oct-27-2009 Reset To Dec-01-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Franchesca Callejo for Marion Jackson.

Ms. Callejo requested a continuance stating that she miscalendared the due date of the accounting, that she had all of the information and that two statements were missing. The matter was continued to December 1, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Sep-15-2009 Set For Order To Show Cause On Oct-27-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

An Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Trustee and the Attorney for failure to file the 2nd Account. The return date is October 27, 2009 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley CSR 225. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Aug-12-2009 Continued To Sep-15-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

The Court stated that the Trustee failed to account. The matter was continued to September 15, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Jackson.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Nov-28-2007 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES
